title: A Decisive Matchup in the Onigashima Raid
description: On pages 2–5, this part focuses on Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Straw Hat Pirates, Sanji, Unknown person #4 as The raid becomes a series of decisive matchups while Luffy challenges Kaido and the Straw Hats protect their allies.
scene: The Onigashima raid breaks into decisive one-on-one and group battles as Luffy, Yamato, Momonosuke, and the Straw Hats push against Kaido’s forces.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: The sounds echo through the night...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The fire festival is a celebration that honors the dead.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We lit this bonfire in the hopes that it would be visible in the heavens.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: He is probably watching over us intently,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: determined to see what becomes of you and the future of this country.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: An additional 5,000 soldiers have been incapacitated.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That means the forces on each side should stand at 24,000 vs 3,000.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: However, the pleasures and waiters on the live floor...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: When you account for these 4,000 men switching sides...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It is hard to believe the disparity in manpower is actually shrinking...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: What an unexpected turn of events.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It seems like the state of this battle is constantly changing as more information comes to light.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Excellent!! The Samurai will finally lose their resolve...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: When they hear their little LORD is dead!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Yeah! Let's go break their spirits!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The same floor - Nami, USOPP, and OTAMA

dialogue.speaker: Law
dialogue.text: THE CLMA- TACT I INVENTED IS TALKING?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Does that make me even more of a genius?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: No, it's like I keep trying to tell you, it's me! The one they used to call zaus!!

dialogue.speaker: Law
dialogue.text: Why are you in my CLima-tact!?

summary: This part advances the Wano / Onigashima War storyline through 44 dialogue beats, focusing on the raid’s momentum, character resolve, and the shifting battle lines.
